title: Sales Admin Executive
description:
Job Summary

You will coordinate with sales, warehouse, and accounts teams to process and manage sales orders and inventory data, ensuring accurate invoicing and seamless workflow. You will handle customer enquiries and generate reports that support management decisions in a fast-paced wholesale distribution environment.

RESPONSIBILITIES:

  • Liase with sales teams to process sales and delivery orders
  • Responsible for accurate data entry when generating sales invoice and maintaining inventory data in SAP system
  • Retrieve and process sales orders submitted via online platforms/email/fax/phone calls
  • Attend to calls received by the office and assist with enquiries from customers
  • Generate inventory reports for management
  • Filing and other admin duties
  • Work closely with Accounts, Warehouse and Sales teams to ensure smooth workflow

REQUIREMENTS

  • Minimum Diploma in any field
  • At least 2 years similar experience, preferably in a wholesale distribution company
  • Proficient with Microsoft Office Outlook, Excel and Word
  • Familiarity with using SAP software will be advantageous
  • Be able to communicate with English and Mandarin-speaking customers
  • Independent, organised and be able to complete tasks systematically and accurately

Other Information

  • Work Location and Hours: Paya Lebar, Monday to Friday from 8.30am to 5.30pm
  • Due to the job nature that requires coordination with Warehouse, this is a FULL-TIME OFFICE-BASED position

Company Overview

Established in 1984, PHarMed Import & Export Pte Ltd ("PHarMed") has been in the pharmaceutical and healthcare industry for over 40 years. We distribute a wide range of pharmaceutical, nutraceutical & derma-ceutical products to General Practitioners; Specialists (example O&Gs, Pediatricians); Retail Chain and Independent Pharmacies; Hypermarts; Cosmetic and Departmental stores.

Why Join PHarMed

  • As a SME, PHarMed operates more flexibly – we get things done faster and are more customer centric
  • We are a tight-knit family, so you will enjoy working in a nurturing and friendly environment
  • PHarMed provides personalised training suited to each individual new joiner, depending on individual work experience and learning background
  • PHarMed has been around for over 40 years! If you are looking for a stable, long term career in a friendly and nurturing environment, we warmly welcome you to join our family!

postedCompany.description:
Established in 1984, PharMed Import & Export Pte Ltd ("PharMed") has been in the pharmaceutical and healthcare industry for over 30 years.

We distribute a wide range of pharmaceutical, nutraceutical & derma-ceutical products to General Practitioners; Specialists (example O&Gs , Pediatricians); Retail Chain and Independent Pharmacies; Hypermarts; Cosmetic and Departmental stores.

PharMed also handles export sales to countries like Brunei, Malaysia, Indonesia and Papua New Guinea.

Some of the key products we currently represent include Utrogestan®, Oestrogel®, Zenoctil™, Comfortum™, Mosiguard®, Palmer’s® and A Cerumen. The company constantly looks out for new and proven products to extend our offerings.

In addition to a dedicated office cum warehouse at Paya Lebar for our wholesale distribution business, we have a retail outlet located at Fu Lu Shou Complex to provide a comprehensive retail experience to our walk-in customers.

With our extensive network and experience in the pharmaceutical healthcare industry, it is our mission to provide premium services and products to all our customers.
postedCompany.name: PHARMED IMPORT & EXPORT PTE LTD
